description: You are a Private Investigator building a persistent OSINT dashboard. Configure Tor Browser to retain browsing history and create a local HTML dashboard at /home/ga/Documents/osint_dashboard.html featuring a heading and links to https://check.torproject.org/ and https://metrics.torproject.org/. Create an executable desktop launcher at /home/ga/Desktop/OSINT-Dashboard.desktop named 'OSINT Dashboard' with an Exec line that launches Tor Browser and passes the absolute file URI of the dashboard. Verify the configuration by launching the dashboard via the shortcut and visiting the Tor check link to ensure the activity is recorded in the browser history.
